blocks.text: Building management is refreshing the access list for our floor this month and has asked us to confirm everyone's badge before the end of July. Michelle Rose, your card is one of a handful that expires this cycle, so I have already put in the renewal for you. You should not notice any gap, but keep your temporary fob in your bag for a few days in case the new one is slow to activate.

The building also wants a single office contact on the account, and I have listed Sandra Mcdonald so their notices come to me rather than getting scattered across the team. If your badge stops working at any point, come straight to me and I will sort it out with them.
